header: Case Study Grid that feels ready to ship

cases.summary: Built to show the case study grid with real labels, compact spacing, modern imagery, and practical states instead of placeholder filler.
Clean hierarchy, restrained borders, and direct actions make this case study grid easy to scan across desktop and mobile previews.
The seeded content keeps the component sleek, credible, and import-ready while staying inside the Desiderio shadcn design language.
